underlying_goal: Migrate an old PHP 7.0 project to PHP 8.2, fixing all errors, updating dependencies, replacing vulnerable libraries, and improving code quality to PHPStan level 5.
friction_detail: Assistant initially tried to fix the 404 routing issue directly before getting full context; user explicitly stopped it and requested investigation via subagents first.
brief_summary: User wanted to migrate an old PHP 7.0 project to PHP 8.2, which required fixing multiple fatal errors, updating Composer/Frontend dependencies, replacing aura/auth and Valitron, and progressively increasing PHPStan level; most goals were achieved through subagent-driven changes.
user_instructions_to_assistant: usa subagentes por favor cuando la tarea sea compleja
no cambies nada, solo haz una review
investiga primero, infórmame y espera a que te confirme qué hacer
usa PHPStan nivel 2 y subamos de nivel poco a poco
